clusters.justification: These terms share neuroimaging co-activation patterns rooted in anterior insula, amygdala, and anterior cingulate networks, representing the high-level functional processing of emotional valence and physiological arousal.

Anchored in ventromedial prefrontal and dopaminergic striatal circuitry, these terms reflect the macroscopic cognitive axis of computing expected outcomes, assessing reward, and driving goal-directed behavior.

Tied to default mode network co-activations (e.g., medial prefrontal cortex, temporoparietal junction), this cluster captures the internally-generated representational axis required to model the self and others.
